parityMeta.describes: iOS-17e-3 progressionRulesEngine parity — increase (double top). A compound templateExercise (repMin 6 / repMax 8 / sets 3 / startWeight 60 / progressionUnitKg 2.5 / progressionPercent [5,10]) with the two most recent sessions BOTH hitting the rep ceiling (3 sets x 8 reps @ 60kg, rir 2, acceptable technique) drives shouldAdd: nextWeight = lastWeight + increment(2.5) = 62.5, reps = repMin, note '连续两次打满上限'. shouldUseTopBackoff true; buildSetPrescription emits the non-conservative top+backoff prescription. FUNCTION-LEVEL compute-assert on the Swift side.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: deterministicClockIso anchored in the PAST => live fineTune window empty (golden-neutral). Sessions listed NEWEST-FIRST so findRecentPerformances yields recent[0]=last, recent[1]=previous. Both hit repMax => hitTop && previousHitTop => shouldAdd.
